title: Investigate & fix production API log errors and noise (post-relaunch triage)

tasks.title: Fix blog tag filter 500 (posts ?tags= as join, not column)
tasks.description: P1/F1. In PostService._executeSearch and _executeCount (packages/service-core/src/services/post/post.service.ts), intercept the `tags` filter before the where clause is built and resolve it against the polymorphic r_entity_tag table (entityType=POST) instead of passing it as a column key to model.findAllWithRelations. Add a regression test: GET /public/posts?tags=<id> returns 200 with only posts carrying that tag, and existing filters (category, isNews, isFeatured) still work.

subtasks.title: Locate where `tags` enters the where clause (mapPostFilterKeysToColumns)
Translate `tags` to an r_entity_tag id-set resolution (findEntityIdsByTags + inArray)
Regression test for ?tags= returning filtered 200

tasks.title: Downgrade expected 401 on protected routes from ERROR+stack
tasks.description: P7/F2. A guest 401 on a protected route is expected. Stop emitting `ERROR` + full stack (`Caught error ... Authentication required`); keep only the HTTP access-log line at the agreed level (see OQ-1). Continuation of HOS-104/105 logging hygiene. Verify a guest hit produces no ERROR+stack.

subtasks.title: Find the auth-required error → log mapping in the API middleware
Map expected 401 to info/debug without stack

tasks.title: Downgrade expected 404 not-found from ERROR (getByField misses)
tasks.description: P8/F2. Public getByField misses (accommodation/post/event not found) currently log SERVICE ERROR + Route error + actor + stack. A 404 is expected. Downgrade to the agreed level (OQ-1) without stack. GATED on OQ-1 owner decision on target level. Verify a missing-slug request logs at most an access line.

subtasks.title: Confirm OQ-1 target level with owner
Adjust not-found → log level mapping

tasks.title: Downgrade expected 403 permission-denied from ERROR
tasks.description: P9/F2. 403 permission denials (e.g. user.getByField 'Only self or USER_READ_ALL') log as ERROR+stack. Downgrade to the agreed level (OQ-1); 403 may stay slightly louder than 404 (probing signal). GATED on OQ-1 + OQ-3 (public profile-by-slug design). Verify.

subtasks.title: Confirm OQ-1/OQ-3 with owner
Adjust forbidden → log level mapping

tasks.title: Stop web from fetching entitlements without a session / retry-looping on 401
tasks.description: P5/F3. Guest requests to /protected/users/me/entitlements climb 82->100 then sustain 429. Investigate the web call site: it must not fetch entitlements without a session, and must not retry-loop on 401. Fix + verify no 429 churn while unauthenticated. Do not break authenticated entitlement gating.

subtasks.title: Trace the entitlements fetch origin in apps/web
Guard on session presence + remove hard retry on 401
Verify no unauthenticated 429 loop

tasks.title: Stop unread-count poller from re-polling on 403
tasks.description: P6/F3. GET /admin/conversations/unread-count returns 403 every ~30s from a client polling without the permission. Make the poller not fire for actors lacking permission, or stop on 403 instead of re-polling. Verify the 30s 403 cadence disappears for a non-permitted actor.

subtasks.title: Find the unread-count polling call site (admin/web)
Gate on permission / stop-on-403

tasks.title: Investigate stale-slug 404 flood source (sitemap / ISR / crawler)
tasks.description: P10/F4. Hundreds of sequential 404s on seed-like slugs. Determine the request source: our own sitemap, ISR warm-up, or an external crawler; and whether it enumerates OLD seed slugs after reseed. Produce a findings note on HOS-109 (OQ-2) then decide fix (regenerate/limit sitemap, cache-bust, or accept + downgrade). Investigation first, no premature fix.

subtasks.title: Identify request UA/source and slug origin
Write findings note + OQ-2 recommendation on Linear

tasks.title: Verify conversation-notification cron lock overlap
tasks.description: P11/F4. `[CRON:conversation-notification] skipping — previous run holds advisory lock` recurs. Verify whether the job ever completes or leaks its advisory lock (job duration vs cron cadence). Write findings on HOS-109; fix only if a real overlap/leak (not a benign skip).

subtasks.title: Inspect the cron job + lock release path
Findings note: benign skip vs real leak

tasks.title: Gate social-publish-dispatch make_api_key warning
tasks.description: P12/F4. `no active make_api_key credential in the vault` warns every 5 min. Confirm it is purely 'vault not configured yet' and gate the WARN so it does not fire on every run when the social feature is intentionally unused (downgrade to a one-time/info log or skip silently when unconfigured).

subtasks.title: Confirm the warning condition in the dispatch job
Gate/downgrade the unconfigured-vault log

tasks.title: Fix Brevo webhook signature verification
tasks.description: P14/F5. `[Brevo webhook: signature mismatch]` -> 401 on POST /public/webhooks/brevo/<token>. Legitimate Brevo callbacks (bounce/open) are being dropped. Diagnose the secret/token config mismatch and fix so real events pass. Verify against a real Brevo test event; if it needs an env change, record it on the Linear issue and flag Coolify.

subtasks.title: Compare expected vs received Brevo signature/token
Fix verification (config or code)
Verify a real Brevo event is accepted

tasks.title: Serve robots.txt and fix RSS feed route
tasks.description: P15/F5. GET /robots.txt returns 404 and GET /public/posts/slug/rss.xml returns 400 (RSS path routed as a post slug). Serve a robots.txt and provide a proper RSS feed route so these stop erroring. Verify both return 200 with correct content-type.

subtasks.title: Add robots.txt (web)
Add/route RSS feed instead of 400
